page_content:
MUSC228 Introduction to Accompanying for Pianists (2 Credits)

A course to introduce the piano major to accompanying at an intermediate level of difficulty. Class instruction will center on rehearsal and coaching geared toward performance, and will be supplemented

by experience working as an accompanist in voice classes or applied studios.

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-School of Music department. Restriction: Must be in a major within ARHU-School of Music department. Repeatable to: 10 credits.
